---
title: "setup.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/node/setup.ts"
loc: 91
complexity: 17
logic_score: 1.13
style_score: 3.81
intel_score: 9.03
overall_score: 4.53
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 18 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://node:fs/promises)
- [fileURLToPath](file://node:url)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [*](file://chalk)
- [execa](file://execa)

### Exports
- `__filename`
- `__dirname`
- `PROJECT_ROOT`
- `CONFIG_PATH`
- `getActivePersona`
- `configData`
- `config`
- `personaLog`
- `isOdin`
- `prefix`
- `color`
- `formattedMessage`
- `getVenvBinaryPath`
- `getVenvBinaryPath`
- `bin`
- `executeGenesisSequence`
- `executeGenesisSequence`
- `persona`
- `venvPath`
- `venvExists`
- `pipPath`
- `remedy`
